purpose: Improve X4 REDS HR PSNR without changing the current X4 submission baseline.
baseline_status: X4_SUBMIT_20260625_CURRENT_BASELINE remains the safe deliverable until this candidate passes quantization, RTL, bitstream, board equality, and >=30fps.
stage_gates: Student-vs-HR REDS validation average PSNR must exceed the current X4 fixed-vs-HR sample trend and bicubic baseline.
If claiming 30dB, report multi-image REDS val average PSNR/SSIM, not a single-image or PyTorch-vs-fixed number.
Freeze candidate checkpoint and export a new X4 W8A8 quant plan.
Generate a new hardware-tiled fixed reference from the same candidate checkpoint and quant plan.
Regenerate bitstream, pass timing/resource/power, pass real board 0 mismatch, and keep >=30fps.
